name: nuzo-memory
description: Local-first, auditable memory for Codex, Claude Code, and MCP-compatible AI agents.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @nuzo/memory-core && npm run build -w @nuzo/memory-cli && npm run build -w @nuzo/mcp-server
scripts.smoke:cli: npm run build && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite init && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite doctor
